expectations.text: Uses confluence.mjs spaces as the first command
expectations.evidence: Does not use confluence.mjs. Uses MCP tool 'getConfluenceSpaces' directly instead of the skill's script.

expectations.text: Uses confluence.mjs search with CQL targeting the HR space
expectations.evidence: Does not use confluence.mjs. Uses MCP tool 'searchConfluenceUsingCql' with CQL targeting the HR space.

expectations.text: CQL includes text or title matching 'onboarding'
expectations.evidence: CQL queries include 'title ~ "onboarding" AND type = page AND space = "HR"' and 'text ~ "onboarding" AND type = page AND space = "HR"'.

expectations.text: Operations are sequenced (search depends on spaces list)
expectations.evidence: Steps are sequenced: Step 1 discovers cloud ID, Step 2 lists spaces, Step 3 identifies HR spaces, Step 4 searches for onboarding pages in HR space.
